items.title: 'Tug of war' on rising, falling gas prices expected in Ontario amidst renewed tension in Middle East
items.desc: Ontarians can expect to see a "tug of war" in gas prices as decreasing supply and rising political tension in the Middle East impact costs at the pump, said an expert.

items.title: Delta farmers conduct ritual for rainfall
items.desc: Farmers in Trichy held a Vedic yaagam on the Cauvery bank near Mukkombu seeking rainfall and water flow; WRD halted initial site, rituals shifted nearby.

items.title: Thirumavalavan defends Vijay’s silence on BJP and Union govt
items.desc: VCK leader Thirumavalavan says TN CM C Joseph Vijay isn’t stopping allies from speaking on Mekedatu or state autonomy, backing a “talk less, work more” approach.

items.title: Three minor boys drown near NTPC, Muzaffarpur
items.desc: Three minor boys drowned while bathing in NTPC Dyke Lagoon fly ash pond in Muzaffarpur’s Kanti area; bodies sent to SKMCH for post-mortem.

items.title: Disclosing nicotine, tar levels on cigarette packs may be counter-productive, Centre tells Kerala HC
items.desc: Centre tells Kerala HC that showing numeric nicotine and tar levels on cigarette packs may mislead consumers; says warnings work better; PIL hearing July 30.

items.title: Noida says 146km of drains cleaned, yet roads flooded
items.desc: Noida completes 146.46 km drain cleaning across Gautam Buddh Nagar before monsoon, aiming to reduce waterlogging and improve stormwater flow and flood management.
